name: HorrorLand Defense
description: HorrorLand Defense is a twisted tower-defense game where cute visuals collide with pure nightmare fuel. You must protect your last safe zone by placing strange, living defenders against relentless waves of grotesque monsters emerging from the darkness. Enemies behave unpredictably, triggering sudden scares and eerie moments. Colorful environments mask a disturbing atmosphere beneath. Web Dev https://www.coolcrazygames.com/ Careful strategy, smart resource management, and fast reactions are essential, because one mistake can let the horror overwhelm everything you’re trying to save.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
